tasks.title: Create shared column constants module
tasks.description: Add frontend/src/constants/columns.ts exporting COLUMNS (readonly Column[], ordered ['todo','in-progress','done'] as const), COLUMN_LABELS (Record<Column,string> = {todo:'Todo','in-progress':'In Progress',done:'Done'}), and adjacentColumnLabel(column, direction) helper. Import the Column type from '@/types'. See blueprint §3.1 for the exact source.
acceptance_criteria: File frontend/src/constants/columns.ts exists and exports COLUMNS, COLUMN_LABELS, adjacentColumnLabel
COLUMN_LABELS is typed Record<Column, string> (removing a key is a compile error)
COLUMNS is typed readonly Column[] and equals ['todo','in-progress','done'] in order
adjacentColumnLabel('todo','left') === undefined and adjacentColumnLabel('done','right') === undefined; adjacentColumnLabel('todo','right') === 'In Progress'
npx tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Migrate useAppStore.ts to shared constants
tasks.description: Remove the local COLUMNS (l.66) and COLUMN_LABELS (l.68-72) declarations in frontend/src/stores/useAppStore.ts and import them from '@/constants/columns'. The move-direction logic (l.807-813, COLUMNS.indexOf / COLUMN_LABELS[targetColumn]) stays unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: No local COLUMNS or COLUMN_LABELS declaration remains in useAppStore.ts
Import from '@/constants/columns' added
Existing useAppStore unit tests (openLogPanel, pollLoop, maxConcurrent, multiRun, and move-direction tests) pass unmodified
npx tsc --noEmit passes

tasks.title: Migrate AutoTaskModal.tsx to shared constants
tasks.description: Remove local COLUMN_LABELS (l.41-45) and COLUMNS (l.47) in frontend/src/components/AutoTaskModal.tsx and import from '@/constants/columns'. The <option> dropdown map (l.284) and useState<Column>('todo') stay unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: No local COLUMN_LABELS or COLUMNS declaration remains in AutoTaskModal.tsx
Column dropdown still renders Todo / In Progress / Done in that order
npx tsc --noEmit passes and existing tests pass

tasks.title: Migrate TaskDetailPanel.tsx to shared constants
tasks.description: Remove local COLUMN_LABELS (l.72-76) and the inline columns literal in findTaskColumn (l.83) in frontend/src/components/board/TaskDetailPanel.tsx; import COLUMNS and COLUMN_LABELS from '@/constants/columns' and use COLUMNS in findTaskColumn.
acceptance_criteria: No local COLUMN_LABELS or inline ['todo','in-progress','done'] literal remains in TaskDetailPanel.tsx
findTaskColumn iterates the shared COLUMNS array
Column selector renders identical labels; npx tsc --noEmit and existing tests pass

tasks.title: Migrate GlobalSearchModal.tsx labels to shared constant
tasks.description: Remove local COLUMN_LABELS (l.24-28) in frontend/src/components/modals/GlobalSearchModal.tsx and import COLUMN_LABELS from '@/constants/columns'. Index with cast + fallback: COLUMN_LABELS[column as Column] ?? column (column comes from an untyped SearchResult). KEEP COLUMN_COLORS local — it is presentation, out of scope.
acceptance_criteria: No local COLUMN_LABELS declaration remains in GlobalSearchModal.tsx
COLUMN_COLORS remains defined locally and unchanged
colLabel still falls back to the raw column string for unknown values
Search result column badges render identical labels; npx tsc --noEmit and existing tests pass

tasks.title: Source Column.tsx and ColumnTabBar.tsx labels from shared constants
tasks.description: In frontend/src/components/board/Column.tsx, build COLUMN_META (l.15-19) with label: COLUMN_LABELS['<col>'] while keeping accentClass/colIndex local (blueprint §3.3). In frontend/src/components/board/ColumnTabBar.tsx, replace the literal TABS array (l.10-14) with COLUMNS.map(column => ({ column, label: COLUMN_LABELS[column] })). Import from '@/constants/columns' in both.
acceptance_criteria: COLUMN_META.label values come from COLUMN_LABELS; accentClass and colIndex remain local and unchanged
ColumnTabBar TABS is derived from COLUMNS + COLUMN_LABELS (no literal label strings)
Board column headers and mobile tab bar render identical labels/order; npx tsc --noEmit and existing tests pass

tasks.title: Derive CardActionMenu directional labels from shared helper
tasks.description: In frontend/src/components/board/CardActionMenu.tsx remove LEFT_LABEL (l.16-19) and RIGHT_LABEL (l.22-25); import adjacentColumnLabel from '@/constants/columns' and compute the move-left/move-right button labels via adjacentColumnLabel(column,'left') / adjacentColumnLabel(column,'right') at the existing call sites. showLeft/showRight/showRunAgent edge logic unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: No LEFT_LABEL or RIGHT_LABEL literal maps remain in CardActionMenu.tsx
Move-left/move-right button labels/tooltips are identical to before for every column
npx tsc --noEmit and existing CardActionMenu tests pass

tasks.title: Verify single-source and full green suite
tasks.description: Confirm the dedupe is complete and behavior is unchanged. Run the type-check, the frontend test suite, and the grep gate from blueprint §4.
acceptance_criteria: grep -rn "'In Progress'" frontend/src returns exactly one hit: constants/columns.ts
The literal ['todo', 'in-progress', 'done'] value array appears only in constants/columns.ts (the Column type union in types/index.ts is allowed and expected)
cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
cd frontend && npm test — all suites green, no test files modified to accommodate the refactor
Manual/visual check: board headers, mobile tab bar, ⌘K search badges, AutoTask dropdown, card move tooltips, TaskDetailPanel selector all show identical labels and order
